everyday with my kids is a great day, some days are just more challenging than others. yesterday was one of those days. one of those days where i had to say no too many times. one of those days where instead of raising my voice i should have shown more patience. where its whatever for lunch and pizza for dinner. one of those days where you see moms on tiktok making everything for their kids from scratch and it just makes you feel so small. i felt like a bad mom. i felt like i could have done more, and i probably could have. but the whole day i was so self critical, and it turns out my baby was just happy as could be. she thinks i’m a good mom. your babies think you’re a good mom/dad too. you’re not alone. i see you. ❤️ #parentsoftiktok #momtok #foryou

I was at work when I was called that my baby sister 21 years old was in a double fatality wreck in Oklahoma 6 days after she moved there. I left work and came home an hour &45 min later my older sister calls me to tell me "it's kaylei" I'll never forget the tone in her voice when she said it. This day lives with me every single day! and I'm not okay, even when it seems to be good days. it's been 8 months and 1 week that's 250 days, Her riders for life (Mandy, Taylor, Chrissy, Justin, Tucker and Daniel),  my family and I load up on the weekends and go to the cemetery at least once a month the most 3xs a month, to clean her old flowers and take some fresh ones. We call it Kaylei's as if we were going to visit her at home. I didn't want to post this as it's very personal, however it's something I don't want to loose if my phone crashes.  #griefjourney💔#forever21#losssiblings_ #sister's#worsedayever😔  remembering you always sweet girl💔
